column.text:
• Cleveland Guardians placed 3B José Ramírez on the 10-day injured list with a left hamate fracture.
• Kansas City Royals placed 1B Vinnie Pasquantino on the 10-day injured list with a right hamate fracture.
• San Diego Padres placed C Freddy Fermin on the 7-day injured list due to a concussion.
• Cleveland Guardians designated LF George Valera for assignment.
• San Diego Padres designated RHP Ty Adcock for assignment.
• San Francisco Giants placed RHP Keaton Winn on the 15-day injured list with a right elbow strain.
• Cleveland Guardians activated SS Gabriel Arias from the 60-day injured list.
• Los Angeles Angels sent 2B Vaughn Grissom on a rehab assignment to Rancho Cucamonga Quakes.
• San Francisco Giants sent RHP Tyler Mahle on a rehab assignment to Sacramento River Cats.
• Texas Rangers recalled LF Alejandro Osuna from Triple-A Round Rock Express.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
